subject: KOTA
value: A South African fast-food shop simulation centred on building and serving kotas or bunny chows, inspired by the accessible customer-service loop of Good Pizza, Great Pizza while rooted in South African culture.

subject: KOTA customers
value: Start with a school child, magogo and taxi driver; unlock more customers and their ingredients as days progress, including a nurse, teacher, police officer, pantsula and culturally diverse local and international visitors.

subject: KOTA
value: The player does not travel to other provinces. Customers from different provinces and cultures come to the shop, with their regional ingredients and stories unlocking over time.

subject: KOTA characters
value: Good Pizza-inspired waist-up or waist-high stylised characters, centred on transparent backgrounds, with readable silhouettes, neutral expressions and authentic South African personality.

subject: KOTA characters
value: Represent South African age, race, class, profession and cultural variety naturally, including school children, elders, workers, creatives, professionals and visitors without making them feel like generic stereotypes.

subject: KOTA NPC interactions
value: Chat when a mission is available

subject: KOTA background NPCs
value: Background or filler NPCs should show short region-specific news text rather than opening the full interaction wheel.
